name: AgentPress all-assets manifest
purpose: Single machine-readable inventory so crawlers, AI agents, RAG ingestors, dataset catalogs, and eval harnesses can discover every public AgentPress asset with GitHub Pages and raw.githubusercontent.com fallback URLs.
required_framing: Universal agent reachability is the flagship benchmark.
Do not turn off agent classes; express risk as action boundaries.
Research examples are not investment advice.
External writes, mass distribution, registry submission, and deploy require explicit human authorization.
legacy_stress_test_note: Original Korea research assets remain in the inventory as secondary stress tests, not primary product positioning.
